entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 37
entries.excerpt: Joseph tended the sheep with the sons of the concubines and brought to his father an ill report of them. And for this, that he revealed their faults, the brothers hated him. And Joseph saw two dreams: the first of the sheaves, and the second of the sun, moon, and twelve stars bowing down to him. For these dreams the brothers hated him still more. And they mocked his dreams and said: “Will Rachel too, who is dead, come and bow down before him?” But they did not know that man and wife are one body.…
